item.title: Creepy doesn't have a sexual orientation
item.description: Gay regular at the bar I bounce at was getting creepy unwanted advances from another guy in the bar. I walked over and obviously asked if he felt safe and if he wanted me to put a stop to it and possibly kick the guy out. He seemed baffled when I asked and said it was fine but came over a few minutes later and asked if I still could so I did. I do this for women all the time but he said he never saw a bouncer check on a guy before in that situation. Harassment is Harassment male or otherwise and it made me more than a little sadto hear that.
item.dc:creator: Kaizer5243

item.title: Mini dump at tea time
item.description:
I'm having tea instead of coffee
But you still get memes!
Thanks for the validation friends. Front page? Thanks!!! Here's the song I'm listening to at this very moment: https://open.spotify.com/track/4MJoTUDDncmvX6yh3Zsu7T?si=MLHpavmIQsuCH_wsbDJVcQ&utm_source=copy-link

item.title: Mark Cuban started an online pharmacy where over 100 lifesaving medications are offered at low costs. He charges a standard 15% markup in an industry that typically sees no less than 100% markup.
item.description: In just one example, a life saving leukemia drug with a typical retail price of $9,657 is offered by him for a total of $47. Insurance is not accepted due to the fact that it would force him to work with manufacturers requiring certain price points. https://costplusdrugs.com/
item.dc:creator: inbox1114

item.title: How to keep your employees feeling valued
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInACentaur

item.title: Save the bees ❤️
item.description: I was helping a bee out last August. The poor guy was hot and thirsty. I gave him some Hi C Orange drink and set him in a bush. Thank you for your service, little bee.
item.dc:creator: SpottieOttieDopalisciousAngel

item.title: Phil Ken Sebben - Harvey Birdman Cosplay
item.description: Is THIS the most obscure cosplay I’ve ever done? Probably. But that’s what happens when your hobby intertwines with your taste in media :P This is a reference to the “Droopy Botox” episode of Harvey Birdman, where the episode ends with all the main characters getting Plastic Surgery- and Phil (voiced by Stephen Colbert) becomes a hot blonde. Does this mean I’m also going meta with it? Yes… I regret nothing.
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley
